title: Crispy Cozy Brazilian Sausage Wrap
description: An earthy and cozy dish featuring crispy sausages folded into a wrap, low in calories, perfect for a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: Mixed greens
ingredients.amount: 1 cup fresh or 2 tbsp chopped frozen

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Break the tortillas into quarters and lightly toast each quarter for about 1 minute on each side.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice and mayonnaise or mustard spread to make the dressing.
Slice the sausages in half crosswise and cook them until they are nicely browned and slightly crispy, around 5-7 minutes total. Let cool before assembling.
On each tortilla quarter, place a few mixed greens leaves, tomato slices, avocado cubes, onion slivers, cilantro leaves, and dollop with the dressing mixture.
Top with cooked sausage halves and roll up tightly to serve.
